name: Dr Mesfin Genie
position: Continuing Senior Lecturer in Health Economics
institution: Newcastle Business School, The University of Newcastle, Australia

education.institution: Ca’ Foscari University of Venice, Italy

education.degree: MSc in Health Economics and Management

bio50: Dr Mesfin Genie is a Continuing Senior Lecturer in Health Economics at the University of Newcastle. His research uses health economics, behavioural economics, discrete choice experiments, eye tracking and decision-support tools to study healthcare decisions, public preferences and policy design.
bio120: Dr Mesfin Genie is a Continuing Senior Lecturer in Health Economics at Newcastle Business School, The University of Newcastle, Australia. His research examines how patients and the public value healthcare, process information and respond to policy. He works across health economics, behavioural economics, stated-preference methods, discrete choice experiments, eye tracking, health measurement and decision-support tools. His applied work spans organ transplantation, diabetes, prostate cancer, dementia, loneliness, telemedicine, medical devices, health workforce, vaccines, mandates and public-health interventions.
